rationale: Extend _get_state_badge() and _box_kind_color() to consult state.type as a new branch after the sub-loop check. Matches existing dispatcher pattern in fsm/executor.py:1218 and fsm/validation.py:710 which already consume state.type=='learning' directly. Reuse score 3/3; no FSM-loader changes; no schema changes. Option B (loader copies type -> action_type) rejected: no precedent for cross-field copy in StateConfig.from_dict, would break the field-independence invariant asserted by test_fsm_schema.py:2868-2870, would silently change executor dispatch semantics (executor.py:1905-1911 interprets unknown action_types as prompts), and would pollute to_dict() roundtrip output.
rule: Renderer consults state.type for kind-scoped badges
alternatives_rejected: Option B: Have the FSM loader copy type: learning into action_type: learning at parse time
